_doc: Per-tool interpretation-card rendering. worker/render.mjs reads this file and stamps each in-scope tool result with an `interpretation` block; the 'How to render tool results' INSTRUCTIONS tell the model to render that block as a 4-line card (Ran/Found/Means/Source) plus, for contact tools, two separate groups. Change rendering by editing this file alone — no code change. Token syntax in templates: {field} pulled from the stamped vars (NOT raw result paths); the stamper in render.mjs computes every var from the real provider result fields.

FS.label: Freshsales
FS.note: Mordor Intelligence's own CRM. Read-only — never written to.

AP.label: Apollo
AP.note: Search is free; enrich + verify cost credits.

CO.label: Clearout
CO.note: Deliverability verdict; gates the verified-only send queue.

DAY.label: Day AI
DAY.note: The only place writes land. Idempotent.

costApprovalNote: needs cost approval — nothing spent yet

freshsales.title: Existing MI contacts
freshsales.subtitle: Mordor Intelligence's Freshsales CRM — people we already know
freshsales.emptyState: No existing MI contacts in Freshsales for this domain.

apollo.title: Net-new (Apollo)
apollo.subtitle: Apollo prospects, not yet in MI's CRM
apollo.emptyState: Apollo returned no net-new candidates for this domain + persona filter.

freshsales_evidence.label: Freshsales
freshsales_evidence.roleNote: Mordor Intelligence's CRM. Never written to. Authoritative for prior touches and duplicate risk.

found.no_data: Nothing on file for this domain.

meaning.ok: MI already knows this account: {accountsCount} account(s), {contactsCount} contact(s), {dealsCount} deal(s). Duplicate risk {duplicateRisk} — reuse the existing relationship; don't create a fresh org.
meaning.no_data: No existing MI record for this domain — safe to treat as net-new, no duplicate-org risk.
meaning.failed: Freshsales was unreachable, so we can't rule out an existing MI account. Do NOT create a new org yet (could duplicate).

cueNote.high: exact-domain CRM match — trust the owner/touch history
cueNote.med: multiple CRM accounts on this domain (or nothing on file) — disambiguate before acting
cueNote.low: unreachable — don't rely on this to skip a dup check

apollo_search.label: Apollo
apollo_search.roleNote: Free metadata search. Emails are masked until apollo_enrich. Tiers are provisional until verified.

meaning.ok: {candidateCount} net-new prospects, tiered {recommended} Recommended / {maybe} Maybe / {hold} Hold. These cost 0 credits to find — pick who to enrich + verify next.
meaning.no_data: Apollo found no decision-makers for this domain + persona filter. Try a different persona pack or widen the role buckets.
meaning.failed: Apollo search failed — try again; no credits were spent.

cueNote.med: search-tier only — confidence rises after enrich + Clearout

apollo_enrich.label: Apollo
apollo_enrich.roleNote: Unmasks email for AM-picked candidate IDs. 24h cache → re-enrich is 0 credits.

meaning.ok: Revealed {enrichedCount} email(s); spent {creditsConsumed} Apollo credit(s){servedFromCacheNote}. The unmasked emails are now ready for Clearout.
meaning.no_data: No candidate IDs supplied — nothing to enrich.
meaning.failed: Enrichment failed for the selected IDs; emails stay masked.

cueNote.high: real address from Apollo — verify with Clearout before queueing
cueNote.med: served from cache — accurate but may be stale

clearout_verify.label: Clearout
clearout_verify.roleNote: Deliverability gate. 30d cache → re-verify is 0 credits. Only a 'verified' verdict is queue-ready.

meaning.ok: {verified} address(es) safe to send, {risky} risky (hold for review), {invalid} cannot be sent. Only the {verified} verified one(s) can enter the send queue.
meaning.no_data: No emails passed in — nothing to verify.
meaning.failed: Clearout was unreachable; verdicts unknown — treat these as NOT queue-ready.

cueNote.med: risky — hold for review, don't auto-send

dayai_write.label: Day AI
dayai_write.roleNote: The only place writes land. Idempotency-keyed → a retry reuses the key and never duplicates. Attributed to the signed-in AM.

meaning.ok: Saved a {type} to Day AI ({name}) attributed to {approvingAm}. It's the system of record now{linkPhrase}. Idempotency key {idempotencyKey} — a retry reuses it, never duplicates.
meaning.replayed: This {type} was already saved (idempotency replay) — no duplicate created. {name} is unchanged.
meaning.failed: Write FAILED and is marked pending_sync. Nothing was saved. Retry with the SAME idempotency key ({idempotencyKey}); never a new one.

cueNote.high: persisted in the system of record with a real record ID

build_receipt.label: Day AI
build_receipt.roleNote: Aggregates all four providers into one color-coded account receipt and writes it as a Day AI context page. Color is the worst provider status.

meaning.green: Account is in good standing. {narrative} Next: {nextAction}
meaning.yellow: Needs an AM decision before proceeding. {narrative} Next: {nextAction}
meaning.red: Stop — something failed or is pending sync. {narrative} Next: {nextAction}

cueNote.med: a duplicate-risk or no-data flag to clear
cueNote.low: a failure or pending sync blocks this account

work_contact.label: Clearout
work_contact.roleNote: Discovers+verifies the email (Apollo+Clearout) and stages a non-salesy draft + LinkedIn note. Sends nothing, writes nothing until you approve.

found.needsCostApproval: Cost gate: {projectedApollo} Apollo + {projectedClearout} Clearout — nothing spent.
found.noEmail: No deliverable email — held for review.

meaning.noEmail: {contactName}: no deliverable email ({emailReason}) — held for review, draft not queue-ready.

cueNote.med: risky email (or cost gate) — held / awaiting approval

work_contacts.label: Clearout
work_contacts.role: bulk outreach loop · aggregate spend gate
work_contacts.roleNote: Runs a slate through the per-contact loop under one aggregate cost-approval gate. Sends nothing, writes nothing.

found.needsCostApproval: {total} contact(s) — up to {projectedApollo} Apollo + {projectedClearout} Clearout — nothing spent.

meaning.ready: Worked {total} contact(s): {verifiedCount} verified and queue-ready, {heldCount} held for review. Spent {creditsApollo} Apollo + {creditsClearout} Clearout credit(s).

cueNote.med: mixed verdicts (or cost gate) — review before queueing
